panels.title: Cpu Usage
panels.description: Overall non-idle CPU percentage averaged across logical CPUs.

panels.title: Memory Usage
panels.description: Memory pressure based on available memory versus total memory.

panels.title: Pagefile Usage
panels.description: Current Windows pagefile utilization percentage.

panels.title: Synthetic Load One

targets.expr: (system_cpu_load_average_1m{instance=~"$instance"} or (system_cpu_utilization{instance=~"$instance"} * clamp_min((count by (instance) (system_cpu_core_utilization{instance=~"$instance"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_time_seconds_total{instance=~"$instance",state="idle"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_info{instance=~"$instance"})), 1))) or on (instance) (0 * system_uptime_seconds{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.description: Windows synthetic one-minute load based on CPU busy ratio and logical CPU entities.

panels.title: Runnable Threads
panels.description: Runnable thread count used by the synthetic Windows load model.

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: System uptime.

panels.title: Cpu Interrupt
panels.description: ISR time share of CPU time.

panels.title: Cpu Dpc
panels.description: DPC time represented through the softirq-compatible CPU state on Windows.

panels.title: Cpu By Core
panels.description: Per-core non-idle CPU utilization.

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (system_memory_slab_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (sum by (instance) (system_windows_vmstat{instance=~"$instance",key="paged_pool_bytes"}) + sum by (instance) (system_windows_vmstat{instance=~"$instance",key="non_paged_pool_bytes"})) or (4096 * (sum by (instance) (system_windows_vmstat{instance=~"$instance",key="paged_pool_pages"}) + sum by (instance) (system_windows_vmstat{instance=~"$instance",key="non_paged_pool_pages"}))) or on (instance) (0 * system_uptime_seconds{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Memory Pressure
panels.description: Available memory percentage. Lower is worse.

targets.expr: (system_cpu_load_average_1m{instance=~"$instance"} or (system_cpu_utilization{instance=~"$instance"} * clamp_min((count by (instance) (system_cpu_core_utilization{instance=~"$instance"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_time_seconds_total{instance=~"$instance",state="idle"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_info{instance=~"$instance"})), 1))) or on (instance) (0 * system_uptime_seconds{instance=~"$instance"})

(avg_over_time(system_cpu_load_average_1m{instance=~"$instance"}[5m]) or (avg_over_time(system_cpu_utilization{instance=~"$instance"}[5m]) * clamp_min((count by (instance) (system_cpu_core_utilization{instance=~"$instance"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_time_seconds_total{instance=~"$instance",state="idle"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_info{instance=~"$instance"})), 1))) or on (instance) (0 * system_uptime_seconds{instance=~"$instance"})

(avg_over_time(system_cpu_load_average_1m{instance=~"$instance"}[15m]) or (avg_over_time(system_cpu_utilization{instance=~"$instance"}[15m]) * clamp_min((count by (instance) (system_cpu_core_utilization{instance=~"$instance"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_time_seconds_total{instance=~"$instance",state="idle"})) or (count by (instance) (system_cpu_info{instance=~"$instance"})), 1))) or on (instance) (0 * system_uptime_seconds{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Context Switches
panels.description: Context switches per second.

panels.title: Interrupt Rate
panels.description: Interrupts per second.

panels.title: Dpc Rate
panels.description: DPC-equivalent events per second via the softirq-compatible counter.

panels.title: Isr Time
panels.description: Seconds of ISR time consumed per second.

panels.title: Dpc Time
panels.description: Seconds of DPC time consumed per second.

panels.title: Read Sectors
panels.description: Sectors read per second, when exported.

panels.title: Write Sectors
panels.description: Sectors written per second, when exported.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (comm, pid) ((process_memory_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance",type="working_set"}) or (process_memory_working_set_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_working_set{instance=~"$instance"})))

topk(10, max by (comm, pid) ((process_memory_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance",type="private_bytes"}) or (process_memory_private_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_private{instance=~"$instance"})))

panels.title: Top Process Read Chars

targets.expr: topk(10, (sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_io_chars_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="read"}[5m]))) or (sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_disk_io_bytes_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="read"}[5m]))))

panels.description: Read chars per second, when exported.

panels.title: Top Process Write Chars

targets.expr: topk(10, (sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_io_chars_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="write"}[5m]))) or (sum by (comm, pid) (rate(process_disk_io_bytes_total{instance=~"$instance",direction="write"}[5m]))))

panels.description: Write chars per second, when exported.

panels.title: Top Process Handles
panels.description: Windows handle count exported through the fd_count-compatible field.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (comm, pid) ((process_memory_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance",type="pagefile_usage"}) or (process_memory_pagefile_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_pagefile_usage{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance",type="commit_charge"}) or (process_memory_commit_charge_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_commit_charge{instance=~"$instance"})))

topk(10, max by (comm, pid) ((process_memory_usage_bytes{instance=~"$instance",type="commit_charge"}) or (process_memory_commit_charge_bytes{instance=~"$instance"}) or (process_memory_commit_charge{instance=~"$instance"})))
max by (device, if_index, is_primary, is_virtual, is_loopback, is_physical, stable_id) (system_network_rx_packets{instance=~"$instance"})
